description: The base class defines `generate()` method with specific parameters, but derived classes in llms.py may not consistently implement error handling for the `stop` parameter validation.
suggested_fix: Add consistent validation in base class for `stop` parameter and ensure all derived classes either use it or override with proper validation.

description: LLM implementations handle API errors differently - some swallow exceptions while others propagate them, creating inconsistent behavior for users of the base interface.
suggested_fix: Define standard error handling patterns in the base class and require derived classes to follow them.

description: The text splitter base class maintains internal state that can be mutated by derived classes, potentially causing race conditions in multi-threaded environments.
suggested_fix: Make state immutable or implement proper locking mechanisms for thread safety.

description: Method names in HTML splitter don't follow the same naming convention as the base text splitter class (e.g., `split_html` vs `split_text`).
suggested_fix: Standardize naming conventions across all splitter implementations.

description: The structured tool interface exposes implementation details of the underlying LLM integration, making it harder to change the implementation later.
suggested_fix: Create a proper abstraction layer that hides LLM-specific details from tool users.

description: The base class doesn't validate input parameters like `temperature` range, which could lead to runtime errors in derived implementations.
suggested_fix: Add parameter validation in the base class with clear error messages.

description: The text splitting algorithm has potential N+1 query problem when processing documents with many chunks.
suggested_fix: Implement batch processing or caching for chunk operations.

description: The tool deserialization process doesn't validate input types, potentially allowing malicious payloads.
suggested_fix: Add strict type checking and input validation during deserialization.

description: Some LLM implementations catch and silently ignore certain API errors, making debugging difficult.
suggested_fix: Log all errors and provide clear error messages to users.

description: HTML-specific text cleaning logic duplicates functionality from the base text splitter.
suggested_fix: Refactor common text cleaning logic into the base class.
